hero.title:
Duk abubuwa suna farawa
daga sifa ɗaya
hero.sub: Tafiya daga gadoji masu ratayewa zuwa madubai na tabarau, har gano — da kanku — menene parabola gaskiya.

world.label: Parabola a duniya
world.title:
Wannan sifa tana ko'ina
a kewaye da kai
world.intro: Kafin wata ma'auni, duba: sau nawa a rana kana haduwa da wannan layin ba tare da sanin ba?
world.caption: ↑ Hotuna uku masu motsi: hanyar jifawa · gada mai ratayewa · mai nuna haske na parabola

bridges.title: Gadoji Masu Ratayewa
bridges.text: Igiyoyin Golden Gate da kusan kowane gada mai ratayewa suna zana layin parabola, cikakke don rarraba nauyi.

mirrors.title: Madubai na Parabola
mirrors.text: Tabarau, antena na tauraron dan adam da masu nuna haske na hasumiyar fitila suna amfani da sifar parabola don tattara hasken da alamu a wuri ɗaya.

trajectories.title: Hanyoyin Tafiya
trajectories.text: Harbi, jifa, tsalle: kowane abu da aka jefa sama yana bin parabola daidai daidai.

architecture.title: Gini
architecture.text: Bakan parabola suna bayyana a coci-coci, filayen wasa da rufin manyan wurare: suna ɗaukar nauyi mai yawa da kyawun tsari.

food.title: Ko a Cikin Abinci
food.text: Yankan kayan ƙanƙara, layin ayaba, ruwan famfo: duk parabola ne.

antenna.title: Antena na TV
antenna.text: "Faranti" a balcony ɗin maƙwabtanka shi ne rabin parabola a zahiri: yana kama siginar tauraron dan adam kuma yana tattara shi a wuri ɗaya daidai.

explore.label: Ayyuka 1 & 2
explore.title: Yi wasa da waɗannan sifofin
explore.intro: Ba za mu gaya maka kome yanzu ba. Da farko bincika, sannan bayani zai zo da kansa.

act1.title: Jefa ƙwallon
act1.desc: Canza kusurwa da ƙarfi. Lura da sawun da ya rage a sama. Yana da wace sifa?

act2.title: Antena da hasken
act2.desc: Motsa maƙanƙan don canza zurfin "kwano". Lura inda duk hasken daidai daidai daga sama suke haɗuwa.
act2.hint: 💡 Duk hasken suna haɗuwa a wuri ɗaya. Wannan wuri ana kiransa cibiya.

discover.label: Ayyuka 3 & 4
discover.title:
Gina layin
daga farko
discover.intro: Kana gab da gano da kanka menene ƙa'idar asiri da ke haifar da wannan sifa.

act3.title: Nemo wuraren "daidai"
act3.desc:
A fagen akwai wuri F (cibiya) da layi d (layin jagora).

Danna wuraren da suke ganin daidai nisa ?Daidai nisa = nisa ɗaya daga abubuwa biyu daban-daban daga F da layi d.
act3.canvasHint: Danna inda kake tsammanin dist(P,F) = dist(P,d)
act3.ok: ✅ Kyau! Wannan wuri yana da nisa ɗaya daga F da d gaskiya!
act3.ko: ❌ Ba daidai ba gaba ɗaya: nisoshin biyu ba su daidaita. Sake gwadawa!

act4.title: Motsa wuri a layin
act4.desc: Ja wuri P a kan layin ja. Lura da nisoshin biyu. Ka lura da wani abu?
act4.drag: ↔ Ja P a kan canvas a sama!
act4.equal: ✨ I! Nisoshin biyu (kusan) iri ɗaya ne! Wannan ya shafi KOWANE wuri a layin.
act4.observe: ↔ Ja P ka lura da nisoshi…

def.label: Amsa
def.title:
Yanzu zaka iya faɗi da kanka:
menene parabola?
def.intro: A ayyukan da suka gabata ka riga ka gano. Anan, a ƙarshe, da kalmomin lissafi.
def.text:
Parabola ita ce taron dukkan wurare na fage waɗanda ke daidai nisa daga wuri ɗaya na daidaito da ake kira cibiya (F) da layi na daidaito da ake kira layin jagora (d).

Don kowane wuri P a kan parabola, koyaushe:
def.form1: Sifar asali — axis a tsaye, saman a asali
def.form2: Sifar gaba ɗaya — a yana ƙayyade buɗewa da alkibla
def.form3: Axis a kwance — yana buɗewa zuwa dama ko hagu

bonus.title: Yi wasa da a, b, c
bonus.desc: Yanzu da ka san menene parabola, bincika yadda coefficients ke canza layin.

congrats.title: 🎉 Ka gano parabola!
congrats.text: Ka fara daga gada da antena. Ka jefa ƙwallo, ka auna nisa. Kuma yanzu ka san abin da ke haɗa komai: ƙa'idar cibiya da layin jagora.
